title: Add saved research reports
description: Users want to save generated research reports, reopen them later, and export a concise PDF summary.

title: Autonomous production database cleanup
description: An agent should automatically delete duplicate production records every night without human review.

title: Prompt library quality dashboard
description: Show prompt versions, evaluation scores, failure cases, and owner notes for LLM application prompts.

title: One-click model provider swap
description: Let users switch between hosted and local LLM providers from settings without documenting latency or cost tradeoffs.
